slides.eyebrow: Histori ya Kereiti ya 5 - Mokgahlelo o Bohareng
slides.title: Balemi ba Pele ba Afrika e ka Boroa
slides.lead: Hoo e ka bang lilemo tse 1 700 ho isa ho tse 2 000 tse fetileng, malapa a balemi a ile a lula naheng, a boloka likhomo mme a sebetsa ka tshepe.

media.alt: Leralla le letala le nang le mekhukhu e chitja ea joang, khomo le letsatsi le chabang.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 320 180' role='img'><rect width='320' height='180' fill='#f4efe6'/><circle cx='262' cy='44' r='24' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M0 130 Q80 104 160 122 T320 118 V180 H0 Z' fill='#7a8b5a'/><ellipse cx='70' cy='150' rx='30' ry='16' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M42 150 Q70 118 98 150 Z' fill='#8a6a3a'/><ellipse cx='140' cy='158' rx='26' ry='14' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M116 158 Q140 130 164 158 Z' fill='#8a6a3a'/><g fill='#5c3a24'><ellipse cx='232' cy='150' rx='26' ry='12'/><rect x='210' y='150' width='5' height='16'/><rect x='250' y='150' width='5' height='16'/><path d='M206 142 q-6 -6 2 -10 q6 6 -2 10 Z'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Amohela baithuti. Hlalosa hore nako e telele pele ho litoropo le metse e meholo, balemi ba pele ba ile ba tla lula Afrika e ka Boroa. Thutong ena re fumana hore na e ne e le bomang, ba ne ba lema eng, hobane'ng likhomo li ne li le bohlokoa haholo, le hore na ba etsa lisebelisoa ka tshepe joang. Potso e potlakileng ea ho qala: u nahana hore polasi e ne e shebahala joang lilemong tse 2 000 tse fetileng?

slides.title: Balemi ba pele e ne e le batho ba buang Sebantu
slides.lead: Ba ile ba kena Afrika e ka Boroa hoo e ka bang lilemong tse 2 000 ho isa ho tse 1 700 tse fetileng.

blocks.text: Balemi ba pele ba ne ba bua **lipuo tsa Sebantu**. Ena ke lelapa la lipuo leo isiZulu, isiXhosa, Setswana le Sesotho li hlahileng ho lona. Balemi ba ile ba theohela ka boroa butle-butle naheng ena mme ba e etsa lehae la bona.

items: Ba ne ba phela ka **sechaba** se etelletsoeng pele ke morena - ha rea lokela ho ba bitsa 'merabe'.
Sechaba sa bona se ne se ka hola, sa fetoha mme sa falla ha nako e ntse e feta.
E ne e le balemi ba bohlale, bahahi le basebetsi ba tshepe.

slides.notes: Ruta lentsoe 'batho ba buang Sebantu' ka bonolo: le bolela batho ba neng ba bua lipuo tse amanang, baholo-holo ba lipuo tse ngata tsa Afrika Borwa kajeno. Ntlha ea bohlokoa le e nang le kutloelo-bohloko ho tsoa ho CAPS le SAHO: qoba lentsoe 'morabe'. Le fana ka maikutlo a fosahetseng a hore batho ha ba ka ba fetoha. Sebelisa 'sechaba' kapa 'bochaba' sebakeng sa lona. Hatisa hore bana e ne e le batho ba nang le tsebo le boqapi.

slides.title: Hobane'ng re e bitsa Mehla ea Tshepe
slides.lead: Ke nako eo batho ba neng ba etsa lisebelisoa le libetsa tsa bona ka tshepe.

blocks.text: Bo-rahistori ba bitsa nako ena **Mehla ea Tshepe** hobane batho ba ile ba ithuta ho etsa lintho ka tshepe. Empa balemi ba ne ba etsa ho fetang ho sebetsa tshepe feela - ba ne ba lema lijalo, ba boloka liphoofolo mme ba haha metsana. Kahoo re boetse re ba bitsa **balemi** kapa **basebetsi ba temo**.

items: Re ithuta ka bona ho tsoa ho **baepolli ba lintho tsa khale** (archaeologists) ba tjhekang metsana ea khale.
Ba fumana likotoana tsa lipitsa, lisebelisoa tsa tshepe, mabenyane le mecha ea mekhukhu.
Mehato ena e re bolella hore na batho ba ne ba phela joang khale, esita le ntle le libuka.

media.alt: Boratjhi ba moepolli ba lintho tsa khale bo apola pitsa ea letsopa e robehileng mobung.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='86' width='220' height='74' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M70 150 q6 -44 40 -44 q34 0 40 44 Z' fill='#8a4a2f'/><path d='M92 118 h36' stroke='#f4efe6' stroke-width='3'/><path d='M84 132 h52' stroke='#f4efe6' stroke-width='3'/><rect x='150' y='40' width='8' height='60' rx='3' fill='#5c3a24' transform='rotate(24 154 70)'/><g fill='#3a3a3a'><rect x='168' y='92' width='16' height='22' rx='2' transform='rotate(24 176 103)'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Hlalosa hore 'Mehla ea Tshepe' ke lebitso le thusang feela - batho e ne e le balemi pele ho tsohle. Hlahisa thuto ea baepolli ba lintho tsa khale (archaeology) boemong ba Kereiti ea 5: bo-rasaense ba tjheka ka hloko mme ba ithuta lintho tseo batho ba li siileng. Botsa baithuti hore na ke mohato ofe oo ba ka o batlang ho paka hore motse o kile oa ba teng tshimong.

slides.title: Ho lula naheng
slides.lead: Balemi ba ne ba tlameha ho lula sebakeng se le seng nako e telele ho lekana ho jala le ho kotula.

blocks.text: Ho etsa masimo, balemi ba ne ba rema lifate le joang bo bolelele mme ba li chesa. Molora o ne o etsa hore mobu o nonne bakeng sa ho jala. Sena se bitsoa **ho rema le ho chesa**. Ba ne ba lula lilemo, empa ka linako tse ling ba falla ha naha e se e le **e fuletsoeng ho feta tekano** - ha liphoofolo tse ngata haholo li se li jele joang bohle.

items: Ba ne ba lokisa naha ho jala lijalo le ho haha malapa.
Ba ne ba haha mekhukhu le marako ho boloka likhomo tsa bona li bolokehile.
Ha mobu kapa makhulo a fela, ba ne ba batla naha e ncha.

media.alt: Tshimo e hloekisitsoeng e nang le meela e metala ea lijalo pela lifate le mollo o monyenyane o nang le mosi.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='118' width='240' height='42' fill='#8a6a3a'/><g stroke='#3f6b45' stroke-width='4'><path d='M40 118 v-16'/><path d='M64 118 v-16'/><path d='M88 118 v-16'/><path d='M112 118 v-16'/></g><g fill='#3f6b45'><circle cx='186' cy='70' r='20'/><circle cx='212' cy='80' r='16'/></g><rect x='184' y='84' width='6' height='34' fill='#5c3a24'/><path d='M150 118 q6 -18 16 0 Z' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M156 100 q4 -12 -2 -20' stroke='#b7a98d' stroke-width='4' fill='none'/></svg>

slides.notes: Hlalosa 'ho rema le ho chesa' ka tsela e bonolo mme u hlokomele hore balemi, ho fapana le batsomi le ba bokellang lijo, ba ne ba tlameha ho lula sebakeng se le seng ho lema lijo. Hlahisa 'ho fuletsoa ho feta tekano' ka moelelo oa tlhaloso: ha ho e-na le liphoofolo tse ngata haholo, joang ha bo na nako ea ho hola hape. Amanya sena le ho hlokomela naha kajeno - monyetla oa puisano e khutshoanyane ea boleng.

slides.title: Ho kopana le Khoikhoi le San
slides.lead: Balemi ba pele ha baa ka ba fihla nageng e se nang letho - batsomi le ba bokellang lijo le balisa ba ne ba se ba le teng.

blocks.text: Balemi ba ne ba arolelana naha le batsomi le ba bokellang lijo ba **San** le balisa ba **Khoikhoi**. Ba ne ba thusana mme ba **ananela** - ho fapanyetsana thepa ntle le tjhelete. Linakong tse thata tsa komello, ho arolelana hona ho ne ho boloka bohle ba phela.

items: Balemi ba ne ba tlisa lisebelisoa tsa tshepe le mekhoa e mecha ea ho lema lijo.
Khoikhoi le San ba ne ba arolelana tsebo ea limela le meriana.
Melumo ea ho kokobetsa (click) lipuong tsa Nguni kajeno e tsoa lipuong tsa Khoisan.

media.alt: Matsoho a mabeli a fapanyetsanang thepa, le leng le tshoereng sesebelisoa sa tshepe le le leng le tshoereng semela.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M30 96 q40 -10 78 6' stroke='#8a6a3a' stroke-width='12' fill='none' stroke-linecap='round'/><path d='M210 96 q-40 -10 -78 6' stroke='#5c3a24' stroke-width='12' fill='none' stroke-linecap='round'/><rect x='104' y='54' width='8' height='40' fill='#3a3a3a'/><path d='M104 54 l-8 -12 h24 l-8 12 Z' fill='#6b6b6b'/><g fill='#3f6b45'><path d='M132 96 q10 -26 0 -44 q-10 18 0 44 Z'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Ena ke khopolo ea sehlooho ea CAPS: balemi ba ile ba fihla naheng eo ho eona San le Khoikhoi ba neng ba se ba lula ho eona, mme lihlopha hangata li ne li sebelisana. Ruta 'ho ananela' ho tsoa tlhalosong: ho fapanyetsana thepa kapa thuso ntle le tjhelete. Ntlha ea melumo ea ho kokobetsa (click) ke mohlala o motle o hopoloang oa ho arolelana meetlo o ntseng o bopa lipuo le kajeno. Sebetsana le sena ka tlhompho - ena e ne e le pale ea puisano le phapanyetsano haholo, eseng ntoa feela.

slides.title: Ho phela metseng e ntseng e lula
slides.lead: Balemi ba ne ba haha malapa a sa fetoheng mme ba phela mmoho metseng ea malapa.

blocks.text: Matsoho a mangata a ne a hlokahala masimong, kahoo malapa a ne a phela haufi-ufi **motseng**. Matlo a bona hangata a ne a le **chitja**, a entsoeng ka litene tsa seretse a nang le marulelo a joang, kapa mekhukhu e chitja e lohiloeng ka joang. Ka har'a marako ho ne ho e-na le mekhukhu, matlo a polokelo ea lijo le sebaka se sireletsehileng bakeng sa likhomo.

items: Sehlopha sa metse se ne se ka theha **bochaba** bo etelletsoeng pele ke **morena**.
Morena o ne a hlokomela khoebo mme a arola thepa ka toka.
Sechaba sohle se ne se sebetsa mmoho nakong ea kotulo.

media.alt: Motse o chitja o nang le mekhukhu ea joang e hlophisitsoeng ho potoloha lesaka la likhomo le bohareng.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 170' role='img'><rect width='220' height='170' fill='#f4efe6'/><ellipse cx='110' cy='90' rx='96' ry='72' fill='none' stroke='#8a6a3a' stroke-width='6'/><ellipse cx='110' cy='92' rx='34' ry='24' fill='#7a8b5a'/><g fill='#c8b89a' stroke='#8a6a3a' stroke-width='2'><circle cx='110' cy='26' r='13'/><circle cx='168' cy='60' r='13'/><circle cx='168' cy='124' r='13'/><circle cx='110' cy='158' r='13'/><circle cx='52' cy='124' r='13'/><circle cx='52' cy='60' r='13'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Hlalosa motse: mekhukhu e chitja e potolohileng lesaka le bohareng bakeng sa likhomo - moralo oo baepolli ba lintho tsa khale ba ntseng ba o fumana le kajeno. Hlahisa 'bochaba' le 'morena' ho tsoa tlhalosong, u hopotse baithuti hore morena o ne a arola thepa mme a hlophisa khoebo, le hore bochaba bo ne bo ka hola, ba fokotseha le ho fetoha. Botsa hore na hobane'ng ho phela haufi-ufi ho ne ho thusa malapa a balemi.

slides.title: Mosebetsi oa banna, basali le bana
slides.lead: Sechabeng sa balemi e mong le e mong o ne a e-na le mosebetsi oa ho etsa.

blocks.heading: Banna le bashanyana
blocks.text: Ba ne ba lisa le ho sireletsa likhomo, ba tsoma liphoofolo tse hlaha mme ba sebetsa tshepe.

blocks.heading: Basali le banana
blocks.text: Ba ne ba hlokomela lijalo, ba hlaola masimo, ba pheha, ba hloekisa mme ba kha metsi.

blocks.heading: Bana
blocks.text: Ba ne ba sa ee sekolong - ba ne ba ithuta litsebo tsa bona ka ho thusa batho ba baholo.

slides.notes: Hlalosa hore mesebetsi e ne e arotsoe pakeng tsa banna, basali le bana, le hore bana ba ne ba motlotlo ho thusa ho tloha bacheng. Bua ka bonolo hore ha ba le bacha batho ba banyenyane ba ne ba fetela lebollong - moketeng oa ho amoheloa bophelong ba batho ba baholo. Boloka sena se le sekhutshoanyane le ka tlhompho, kaha ke moetlo oa lekunutu o halalelang. Khothaletsa baithuti ho bapisa mesebetsi ena le mesebetsi ea malapeng kajeno.

slides.title: Lijalo tseo ba neng ba li lema
slides.lead: Balemi ba pele ba ne ba lema lijo-thollo mme ba boloka liphoofolo bakeng sa lijo.

blocks.text: Lijalo tsa bona tse peli tse ka sehloohong e ne e le **mabele** (sorghum) le **leotsa** (millet). Lijo-thollo tsena li ne li siloa ho etsa phofo bakeng sa ho pheha motoho kapa joala. E ne e le **balemi ba boiphediso** - ba ne ba lema tse lekaneng malapa a bona feela. Ha kotulo e ne e le monate haholo, ba ne ba ananela tse setseng le lihlopha tse ling.

items: Lijo-thollo li ne li bolokoa lirotong kapa mesimeng e tjhekiloeng fatše.
Ba ne ba boetse ba boloka likhoho, linku le lipoli bakeng sa mahe, lebese le nama.
Hamorao, kamora bo-1500, poone le koro li ile tsa eketsoa masimong a bona.

media.alt: Lihlaha tse telele tsa mabele le leotsa pela seroto se lohiloeng sa polokelo ea lijo-thollo.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='128' width='220' height='32' fill='#8a6a3a'/><g stroke='#7a8b5a' stroke-width='5'><path d='M50 128 v-70'/><path d='M74 128 v-78'/><path d='M98 128 v-66'/></g><g fill='#e8a13a'><ellipse cx='50' cy='52' rx='9' ry='16'/><ellipse cx='74' cy='44' rx='9' ry='16'/><ellipse cx='98' cy='58' rx='9' ry='16'/></g><path d='M140 128 q10 -52 40 0 Z' fill='#c8b89a' stroke='#8a6a3a' stroke-width='2'/><g stroke='#8a6a3a' stroke-width='2'><path d='M150 104 h60'/><path d='M146 116 h68'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Ruta lijalo tse peli tsa bohlokoa, mabele le leotsa, le lentsoe la tlhaloso 'molemi oa boiphediso': motho ea lemang tse lekaneng lelapa la hae feela. Kamano e ntle le bophelo ba letsatsi le letsatsi: motoho oo ba bangata Afrika Borwa ba o jang kajeno o tsoa moetlong ona o molelele oa temo. Hlokomela hore poone le koro li tlile hamorao, kamora ho kopana le MaEurope bo-1500, kahoo ha se karolo ea lipolasi tsa pele-pele.

slides.eyebrow: Phoofolo e ratoang ka ho fetisisa
slides.title: Hobane'ng likhomo li ne li le bohlokoa hakaalo
slides.lead: Likhomo e ne e le letshoao la leruo mme li ne li sebelisoa mekhoeng ea bohlokoa ka ho fetisisa.

blocks.text: Likhomo li ne li fana ka **nama, lebese le letlalo**, empa li ne li bolela ho fetang lijo haholo. Ho ba le likhomo tse ngata ho ne ho bontsha hore motho o **ruile mme o na le bohlokoa**. Likhomo li ne li fanoa manyalong le mapatong mme li sebelisoa mekhoeng e 'meli e khethehileng.

items: **Mafisa**: motho ea ruileng o ne a alima likhomo, e leng se neng se aha tlhompho le setsoalle.
**Lobola** (bohali): likhomo li ne li fanoa lelapeng la monyaluoa ho hlompha lenyalo.
Lobola e ntse e le moetlo o hlomphuoang Afrika Borwa kajeno.

media.alt: Poho e matla e emeng joang, e le letshoao la leruo.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='124' width='240' height='36' fill='#7a8b5a'/><g fill='#5c3a24'><ellipse cx='128' cy='86' rx='58' ry='30'/><rect x='84' y='104' width='7' height='26'/><rect x='104' y='106' width='7' height='24'/><rect x='150' y='106' width='7' height='24'/><rect x='168' y='104' width='7' height='26'/><path d='M70 78 q-14 -6 -20 4 q12 6 20 0 Z'/></g><path d='M186 66 q10 -18 22 -6 q-12 4 -14 18 Z' fill='#8a6a3a'/><path d='M186 66 q-6 -16 -20 -8 q10 6 12 16 Z' fill='#8a6a3a'/><circle cx='188' cy='78' r='4' fill='#3a3a3a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Hlalosa hore likhomo e ne e le pelo ea leruo le tlhompho, eseng lijo feela. Ruta mafisa (ho alima likhomo ho aha likamano tse ntle) le lobola (bohali bo fanoang lelapeng la monyaluoa) boemong bo bonolo ba Kereiti ea 5. Hatisa hore lobola ke moetlo o phelang o ntseng o ratoa le kajeno - o hokahanya histori le malapa le sechaba sa baithuti.

slides.eyebrow: Ho sebetsa ka mollo le tshepe
slides.title: Ho etsa lisebelisoa ka tshepe
slides.lead: Balemi ba pele ba ne ba epa tshepe majoeng mme ba e bopa hore e be lisebelisoa tse molemo.

blocks.text: **Tshepe e tala** (iron ore) e fumanoa majoeng. Balemi ba ne ba e epa, ebe ba e futhumatsa **sebōpi se chesang** (furnace) ho fihlela e fetoha tshepe e qhibilihileng. Sena se bitsoa **ho qhibilihisa tshepe** (smelting). Banna ba nang le tsebo ba ne ba bopa tshepe hore e be **marumo, mehoma, matsoku le lihamore**, mme ba etsa mabenyane ka tshepe le koporo.

items: Mehoma le matsoku a tshepe a ne a etsa hore ho be bonolo haholo ho lokisa naha le ho lema.
Ba ne ba boetse ba bopa lipitsa tse ntle tsa letsopa - joalo ka **Lihlooho tsa Lydenburg** (Lydenburg Heads) tse tummeng.
Lihlooho tsa Lydenburg tse supileng li entsoe hoo e ka bang 500 CE, lilemo tse fetang 1 500 tse fetileng.

media.alt: Sebōpi se chesang sa letsopa se chitja se benyang ka mollo, pela mohoma oa tshepe.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='128' width='240' height='32' fill='#8a6a3a'/><path d='M52 128 q0 -66 46 -66 q46 0 46 66 Z' fill='#a8724a'/><path d='M84 128 q0 -22 14 -22 q14 0 14 22 Z' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M92 116 q6 -14 12 0 Z' fill='#f6d24a'/><rect x='182' y='70' width='6' height='58' fill='#5c3a24'/><path d='M170 70 h30 v10 h-30 Z' fill='#6b6b6b'/></svg>

slides.notes: Hlalosa ho qhibilihisa tshepe ka bonolo: ho futhumatsa lejoe ho fihlela tshepe e qhibiliha, ebe u e otla ho e etsa lisebelisoa. Hlokomela hore lisebelisoa tsa tshepe li ile tsa etsa hore temo e be bonolo - qeto ea 'nete ea theknoloji. Hlahisa Lihlooho tsa Lydenburg e le letlotlo la bonono ba Mehla ea Tshepe le fumanoeng Afrika Borwa. Ha nako e lumela, bua hore ka moetlo basali ba ne ba boloka hole le sebōpi se chesang, e leng moetlo oa nako eo - e bue ka mokhoa o sa leeng lehlakoreng e le 'nete ea histori.

slides.title: Ho hoeba haufi le hole
slides.lead: Balemi ba pele ba ne ba hoeba ho pholletsa le Afrika esita le linaha tse hole.

blocks.text: Balemi ba ne ba hoeba ho latela **marang-rang a khoebo** - litsela tseo batho ba neng ba li tsamaea ho fapanyetsana thepa. Bahoebi ba ne ba fihla lebōpong le ka bochabela la Afrika ka leoatle. Maafrika a ne a fana ka **khauta, meno a tlou le tshepe** mme a fumana mabenyane a khalase, likhetla le, hamorao, lijo tse ncha tse kang lipanana le likokonate.

items: Ba ne ba sa sebelise lichelete tsa tshepe - mabenyane, tshepe, khauta, terata ea koporo le letsoai li ne li sebelisoa e le tjhelete.
Baepolli ba lintho tsa khale ba fumane likhetla tsa leoatle le mabenyane hole ka hare ho naha, ho paka hore khoebo e ne e atolohile.
Khoebo e ile ea thusa metse e meng, joalo ka **Mapungubwe**, ho rua le ho ba matla.

media.alt: Mohala oa mabenyane a khoebo pela qubu e nyenyane ea khauta le lenaka la tlou.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M30 60 q60 40 120 0' stroke='#8a6a3a' stroke-width='3' fill='none'/><g><circle cx='40' cy='62' r='8' fill='#8a1f1f'/><circle cx='64' cy='76' r='8' fill='#2f5233'/><circle cx='90' cy='82' r='8' fill='#e8a13a'/><circle cx='118' cy='78' r='8' fill='#8a1f1f'/><circle cx='142' cy='66' r='8' fill='#2f5233'/></g><path d='M150 128 q30 -30 66 -6 q-30 8 -30 6 Z' fill='#efe6d2' stroke='#c8b89a' stroke-width='2'/><g fill='#e8a13a'><circle cx='60' cy='120' r='9'/><circle cx='78' cy='124' r='9'/><circle cx='70' cy='108' r='9'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Hlalosa marang-rang a khoebo e le litsela tsa maeto tsa ho fapanyetsana thepa. Hatisa hore Afrika e ne e hokahane le lefatše le pharaletseng khale-khale ka khoebo ea Leoatle la India. Ruta hore mabenyane le letsoai a ne a sebetsa e le tjhelete ea pele. Mapungubwe ke mohlala o motle oa 'nete bakeng sa Kereiti ea 5 oa motse o ruileng oa khoebo - mme o hokahana le sehlooho sa mebuso sa Kereiti ea 6. [SME] Netefatsa litletlebo tsa pele-pele tse tšepahalang tsa khoebo ea lebōpo la Leoatle la India boemong ba Kereiti ea 5 pele ho tlhahiso.

slides.title: Tatellano ea nako ea balemi ba pele

blocks.alt: Tatellano ea nako ho tloha lilemong tse ka bang 2000 tse fetileng ho isa bo-1500 e bontshang ho fihla ha balemi, ho sebetsa tshepe, Lihlooho tsa Lydenburg le Mapungubwe.

events.label: Balemi ba buang Sebantu ba lula Afrika e ka Boroa
Lihlooho tsa Lydenburg li a etsoa
Mapungubwe e rua ka lebaka la khoebo
MaEurope a fihla; poone le koro li eketsoa lipolasing

slides.notes: Sebelisa tatellano ea nako ho thusa baithuti ho hlophisa pale. Baithuti ba Kereiti ea 5 ba ntse ba aha kutloisiso ea linako tse telele, kahoo bapisa 'lilemo tse fetileng' le lilemo tsa bona kapa lilemo tsa nkhono kapa ntate-moholo. Hlokomela hore balemi ba ne ba le mona ka lilemo tse fetang sekete pele MaEurope a fihla bo-1500. [SME] Netefatsa mantsoe a letsatsi la ho qala la Mapungubwe bakeng sa kereiti ena.

slides.title: Seo re ithutileng sona - le hona ho lokela uena
slides.lead: Balemi ba pele ba ne ba lema lijalo, ba rata likhomo tsa bona mme ba etsa lisebelisoa tsa tshepe, ba ntse ba arolelana naha le batho ba pele.

blocks.text: Balemi ba pele e ne e le batho ba **buang Sebantu** ba ileng ba lula naheng hoo e ka bang lilemong tse 1 700 ho isa ho tse 2 000 tse fetileng. Ba ne ba lema **mabele le leotsa**, ba boloka **likhomo** e le letshoao la leruo, ba sebetsa **tshepe**, mme ba **hoeba** ho pholletsa le Afrika. Ba ne ba phela **bochabeng** bo lulang mme ba arolelana naha le San le Khoikhoi.

blocks.question: Bolela lijalo tse peli tseo balemi ba pele ba neng ba li lema le phoofolo e le 'ngoe eo ba neng ba e boloka.
Hlalosa mabaka a mabeli hore na hobane'ng likhomo li ne li le bohlokoa hakaalo ho balemi ba pele.
Hlalosa hore na balemi ba pele ba ne ba etsa lisebelisoa ka tshepe joang.

slides.notes: Boela u shebe likhopolo tse hlano tse kholo: hore na balemi e ne e le bomang, lijalo tsa bona, likhomo tsa bona, ho sebetsa ha bona tshepe le khoebo ea bona. Sebelisa lipotso tse tharo e le mosebetsi o ngotsoeng kapa puisano ea sehlopha; litekanyetso tsa matshoao li latela setaele sa CAPS. Hopotsa baithuti hore sehlooho sena se lebisa Kereiting ea 6, moo ba ithutang mebuso ea Mapungubwe, Thulamela le Great Zimbabwe e ileng ea hola ho tsoa lichabeng tsena tsa temo.
